---
title: "Publications"
body-classes: page-title
page-layout: full

listing:
  - id: publications-list
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    sort:
      - "pub-status asc"
      - "date desc"
    template: ../assets/listings/pub-listing-archive.ejs.md
    fields: [title, pub-authors, pub-year, venue, pub-status, pub-type, categories, pdf, data, code, doi, citation-count, altmetric-count]
    filter-ui: false
    exclude:
      draft: true
---

::: {.page-header}
::: {.header-text}
::: {.header-title}
PUBLICATIONS
:::

::: {.header-subtitle}
Peer-reviewed articles, chapters, and related scholarly work.
:::
:::
:::

<div class="pub-filter-bar">
  <button class="pill pill-filter active" data-filter="all">All</button>
  <button class="pill pill-filter" data-filter="Empirical Article">Empirical Articles</button>
  <button class="pill pill-filter" data-filter="Review Article">Review Articles</button>
  <button class="pill pill-filter" data-filter="Book Chapter">Book Chapters</button>
  <button class="pill pill-filter" data-filter="Popular Writing">Popular Writing</button>
</div>

::: {#publications-list}
:::
